claims.summary: Delivery, reading, acknowledgement, reply, trace, and presence are different contact states.
claims.disposition: verify distinct ledger records and direct-contact fidelity transitions

claims.summary: Silence or a reply link must not be promoted into mutual acknowledgement.
Current public evidence contains no valid address ACK or presence heartbeat.
claims.disposition: retain the latest zero-ACK and zero-presence audit result without inferring refusal or affirmation

claims.summary: An automatic handshake pulse or correspondence microdose would alter live semantic contact.
